399.reason: [Accessing Grammar_Pointer+2 without ensuring sufficient tokens exist leads to potential IndexOutOfBoundsException; condition logic is flawed as it assumes all non-main units are declarations based on a lookahead of 2, which doesn't align with grammar CompUnit → {Decl} {FuncDef} MainFuncDef]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Accessing Grammar_Pointer+2 without ensuring sufficient tokens exist leads to potential IndexOutOfBoundsException; condition logic is flawed as it assumes all non-main units are declarations based on a lookahead of 2, which doesn't align with grammar CompUnit → {Decl} {FuncDef} MainFuncDef]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Accessing Grammar_Pointer+2 without bounds check; assumes at least 3 tokens exist, which may not be true for empty or minimal input. Also, condition logic is flawed: it tries to distinguish Decl from FuncDef by looking ahead to '(' but doesn't account for variable declarations or other constructs properly.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Accessing Grammar_Pointer+2 without bounds check; condition assumes function declarations have '(' at +2, but may not hold for empty input or malformed decls]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.25 , reason:  [Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException: Grammar_Pointer+2 may exceed Wordslist size; also logic flaw—assumes function definitions always have '(' at +2, which may not hold during error recovery or malformed input]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Accessing Grammar_Pointer+2 without bounds check; also logic flaw: assumes all non-main functions have '(' at +2, but Decl tokens like 'const int a;' don't contain '(' and loop condition may never be met or crash]
